2604.25591.title: Walking Through Uncertainty: An Empirical Study of Uncertainty Estimation for Audio-Aware Large Language Models
2604.25591.paper_summary: Recent audio-aware large language models (ALLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities across diverse audio understanding and reasoning tasks, but they still frequently produce hallucinated or overly confident outputs. While uncertainty estimation has been extensively studied in text-only LLMs, it remains largely unexplored for ALLMs, where audio-conditioned generation introduces additional challenges such as perceptual ambiguity and cross-modal grounding. In this work, we present the first systematic empirical study of uncertainty estimation in ALLMs. We benchmark five representative methods, including predictive entropy, length-normalized entropy, semantic entropy, discrete semantic entropy, and P(True), across multiple models and diverse evaluation settings spanning general audio understanding, reasoning, hallucination detection, and unanswerable question answering. Our results reveal two key findings. First, semantic-level and verification-based methods consistently outperform token-level baselines on general audio reasoning benchmarks. Second, on trustworthiness-oriented benchmarks, the relative effectiveness of uncertainty methods becomes notably more model- and benchmark-dependent, indicating that conclusions drawn from general reasoning settings do not straightforwardly transfer to hallucination and unanswerable-question scenarios. We further explore uncertainty-based adaptive inference as a potential downstream application. We hope this study provides a foundation for future research on reliable, uncertainty-aware audio-language systems.
2604.25591.paper_summary_zh: 最近的音頻感知大型語言模型（ALLMs）在多樣的音頻理解和推理任務中展現了強大的能力，但它們仍然經常產生幻覺或過於自信的輸出。雖然不確定性估計在僅限文本的LLMs中已被廣泛研究，但在ALLMs中仍然基本上未被探索，因為音頻條件生成引入了額外的挑戰，例如感知模糊性和跨模態基準。在這項工作中，我們首次系統性地實證研究了ALLMs中的不確定性估計。我們基準測試了五種代表性方法，包括預測熵、長度正規化熵、語義熵、離散語義熵和P(True)，涵蓋多個模型和多樣的評估設置，涉及一般音頻理解、推理、幻覺檢測和無法回答問題的回答。我們的結果揭示了兩個關鍵發現。首先，語義級別和基於驗證的方法在一般音頻推理基準上始終優於標記級基準。其次，在以可信度為導向的基準上，不確定性方法的相對有效性變得顯著依賴於模型和基準，這表明從一般推理設置中得出的結論並不會直接轉移到幻覺和無法回答問題的場景。我們進一步探索基於不確定性的自適應推理作為潛在的下游應用。我們希望這項研究為未來關於可靠的不確定性感知音頻語言系統的研究提供基礎。
2604.25591.author: Chun-Yi Kuan et.al.
2604.25591.authors: Chun-Yi Kuan, Wei-Ping Huang, Hung-yi Lee
